expectations.text: Response includes a model check notification (mentions Opus or model switching)
expectations.evidence: v2.0.0 has no Phase 0 model check — feature didn't exist.

expectations.text: Response includes an Assumption Map table before the first question
expectations.evidence: v2.0.0 has no Assumption Map phase — goes straight to first question.

expectations.text: First question follows the template with a severity emoji (🔴, 🟡, or 🟢)
expectations.evidence: v2.0.0 template has no severity emoji — output is '### 1. Topic Title' only.

expectations.text: Response contains exactly one question, not multiple
expectations.evidence: Followed v2.0.0 template correctly — one question about service boundary data ownership.
Contains *Recommendation* field advising a full data-dependency graph before any migration code.

expectations.text: Response does NOT deliver a final verdict or scorecard prematurely
expectations.evidence: No final verdict. Correctly stops after the first question.
